# Complex mathematics index

1. Prime theorem: $\pi(x) \sim \frac{x}{\ln x}$
2. Euler identity: $e^{i\pi}+1=0$
3. Circle area: $A=\pi r^2$
4. Derivative: $\frac{d}{dx}e^x=e^x$
5. Independent events: $P(A\cap B)=P(A)P(B)$
6. Linear regression: $y=\mathbf{w}^{\top}\mathbf{x}+b$
7. Sigmoid: $\sigma(z)=\frac{1}{1+e^{-z}}$
8. Cross entropy: $\mathcal{L}=-\sum_i y_i\log\hat{y}_i$
9. Gradient descent: $\theta_{t+1}=\theta_t-\eta\nabla_\theta\mathcal{L}$
10. Convolution: $(f*g)(t)=\int f(\tau)g(t-\tau)\,d\tau$
11. Attention: $\text{Attention}(Q,K,V)=\text{softmax}\left(\frac{QK^\top}{\sqrt{d_k}}\right)V$
12. Normalization: $\hat{x}=\frac{x-\mu}{\sqrt{\sigma^2+\epsilon}}$
13. Fine-structure constant: $\alpha=\frac{e^2}{4\pi\varepsilon_0\hbar c}$

Bare inline: 模型使用 y=\mathbf{w}^{\top}\mathbf{x}+b 进行预测。

| Name | Formula |
| --- | --- |
| Gradient descent | \theta_{t+1}=\theta_t-\eta\nabla_\theta\mathcal{L} |
